name: Rupintrivir
description: Rupintrivir is a rhinovirus 3C protease inhibitor in development for use against human rhinoviral (HRV) infections. Rupintrivir was active against all 48 HRV serotypes tested in a cell protection assay in H1-HeLa cells. It is designed to combat colds caused by rhinovirus.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in viral infection.
mechanismOfAction: The 3C protease (3CP) enzyme is central to rhinovirus replication. By binding to and inhibiting this enzyme, AG7088 prevents rhinovirus replication in cells of the respiratory tract and stops cold symptoms developing.
